paper_location: Methods §Genome-wide scan; basis of all rank claims (Table 1, Table 2, Table S2, Table S4, Fig 2-3)
description: Per-gene mean TMRCA and within-population rank percentile for all 19,119 protein-coding genes × 26 populations, plus min_rank/min_pop/max_rank/rank_range columns.

paper_location: Methods §Genome-wide scan; Table 1 / Table 2 / Table S4 lookup table
description: Per-gene min_rank, min_pop, max_rank, rank_range across the 26 populations (geometric-mean rank).
Per-gene flag for ≥50% overlap with UCSC genomicSuperDups intervals.
GO/Reactome pathway enrichment of low-rank genes within each superpopulation; columns include n_genes, n_below, fold, perm_p, q.
19,119 protein-coding genes; 1,296 SD-flagged (6.8%); 26 populations; 5 superpopulations.
23 canonical sweeps with min_rank, min_pop, rank_range, biology, original reference, SD-overlap flag.

paper_location: Main Table 2 (Novel sweep candidates with variant-level evidence)
description: 5 replicated novel candidates with hand-curated AF-cutoff depleted:enriched counts and max FST. Cutoffs: depleted = AF<10% focal & >30% in any non-focal superpop; enriched = AF>50% focal & <30% in all non-focal superpops.
165 hierarchically-clustered loci with focal/min ranks, iHS/nSL/H12 percentiles, hierarchical q-value, cluster members.
Top 50 genes by min_rank after excluding SD-flagged genes; sorted ascending.

paper_location: Methods §Hierarchical FDR; Table S2 q-value column
description: Per-gene Lancaster-style hierarchical p-values combining within- and between-superpopulation evidence; q values BH-adjusted.
Diploid sample counts per 1000 Genomes population.
Per-gene canonical-sweep stats used to populate Table S3 / cross-method concordance.

12 genes flattened from per-gene JSONs: window-level (no AF cutoff) depleted/enriched counts, max FST, mean top-10 FST, most-differentiated variant coordinates and frequencies. Used for orthogonal columns of Table 3.
One JSON per (gene, focal-pop) pair: ABCC11, BPIFA2, CCDC92, CLEC6A, EDAR, GRK2, IFIH1, KITLG, LCT, SLC24A5, SLC6A15, TREM2.

paper_location: Provenance for Main Table 2 numbers (42:1, 127:2, 70:2, 265:18, etc.)
description: Per-experiment FINDINGS.md narratives produced 2026-04-09; the explicit AF-cutoff counts cited in Table 2 are stated in the body of each file.

paper_location: Methods §Haplotype-based orthogonal statistics; Table S2 H12 column
description: Per-window Garud H12 with 400-SNP / 50-SNP-step windows. One CSV per (chromosome × population). Used for genome-wide H12-percentile ranking in Table S2.
±500 kb gene-centred H12 maxima for case-study exemplars (GRK2, TREML1/TREM2, IFIH1, CCDC92, CLEC6A, SLC6A15, BPIFA2) per focal population.
selscan XP-EHH vs YRI averaged over the gene body for the candidate gene set within ±2 Mb.
CLUES2 result_inference / result_freqs / result_post / result_CI text outputs for LCT, GRK2, CCDC92, BPIFA2, SLC6A15, CLEC6A, C11orf65, TREM2.
Per-population H12 max within ±500 kb of TREM2 used in the deep-dive figure.
Haplotype-sharing summary for TREM2 across populations.
Concordance of three orthogonal statistics at TREM2.
Δ allele-frequency for variants in the TREM2 region between superpopulations.
Companion haplotype-sharing summary for GRK2.
Per-position genome-accessibility track around GRK2.

paper_location: Section 2.5 / Table S5; SI prose '52 distinct selection-scan resources audited across seven progressively-deeper rounds'
description: 60 markdown source reports + INDEX + cross-check + bib-additions covering all selection-scan resources screened for prior reports of TREML1/TREM2.
Top-line narrative of the 7-round literature audit (which scans were screened, what was and was not found).
Coordinate-level grep against per-position scan outputs that publish them.
Per-gene literature review of the 5 novel candidates (GRK2, BPIFA2, SLC6A15, CCDC92, CLEC6A) against PubMed, Scholar, and major selection-scan databases.
473 stage-4 genes annotated with PopHumanScan / 5-scan hit status — used to compute the novelty fraction.

paper_location: Methods §Stage-5 hierarchical clustering; Table S2 prior-scan column
description: Per-locus prior-scan flags (representative gene + cluster).
Per-locus hits in Voight 2006, Sabeti 2007, Metspalu 2011, Pickrell 2009, Grossman 2013 — populates the 'in_5scan' column.
Catalog of prior selection scans screened specifically for TREM1/TREM2 hits.
Pre-submission audit of every BibTeX key cited in main.tex / si.tex.
